title: New evangelion 30 10 preview FAKE
wikitext:
[]: New evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 preview [FAKE]             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Tue May 03, 2016 2:37 am Has anyone seen the very possibly fake trailer that was just leaked for 3.0 + 1.0? You know the one which features Gendo with his hand reaching out and what seems like casting an A.T field? If you haven't you might wanna search Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 in the news section of google.

[]: Re: New evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 preview             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 03, 2016 3:00 am thread/18048/Youtube-3010-Announcement-Trailer-Confirmed-Fake-and-Removed/

[]: Re: New evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 preview             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Tue May 03, 2016 3:21 am In that thread it said the release date was 31st of August. In the trailer it stated 26th of October. http://en.yibada.com/articles/120215/20160429/rebuild-of-evangelion-3-0-1-0-release-date-rumored-trailer-for-fourth-eva-film-shows-gendo-as-new-adam-spoilers.htm

[]: Re: New evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 preview             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue May 03, 2016 7:52 am That trailer's talked about later in the thread, around the end of page 1. Sadly, it's fake too. It's made up of recycled footage from the previous movies, the animator expo shorts, and colored manga panels with some special effects overlays. The narration is also recycled straight from 3.0 and there's a shot of Shinji walking away that has the Animator Expo logo half-visible in the upper right corner. When Khara themselves debunked the first trailer, they added that they do not use youtube and do not have an official presence there.

[]: Re: New evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 preview             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue May 03, 2016 1:05 pm You'll know when a real 3.0+1.0 preview is released because this area of the Evageeks forum will EXPLODE with conversation.

[]: Re: New evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 preview             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Tue May 03, 2016 1:13 pm ^ Better get the Bunker ready, just in case.

[]: Re: New evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 preview             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue May 03, 2016 1:41 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: You'll know when a real 3.0+1.0 preview is released because this area of the Evageeks forum will EXPLODE with conversation.

[]: Re: New evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 preview             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 03, 2016 3:07 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Sadly, it's fake too.
